scripts.db:shell: docker exec -it mongodb mongosh -u admin -p admin123
scripts.export: docker exec mongodb mongodump -u admin -p admin123 --authenticationDatabase admin --db test --archive=/tmp/backup.gz --gzip
scripts.import: docker exec mongodb mongorestore -u admin -p admin123 --authenticationDatabase admin --db pokemon /tmp
scripts.import:friends: docker exec mongodb mongorestore -u admin -p admin123 --authenticationDatabase admin --db friends /tmp
